description: Cut v0.1.14: first end-to-end release on top of the worklist-history feature.

items.before: Last release was v0.1.13 (commit cad4262). Since then we've landed the worklist-history feature, the dual-readership framing, and multi-file diff support — squashed/sequenced into 879f9cd (code), 15fe82b (initial docs), b50de3c (framing), and 61e18a1 (multi-file scope). No version bump yet; the on-disk binary still identifies as 0.1.13.
items.after:
Standard release-cut per the conventions.md recipe:

1. Bump version `0.1.13` → `0.1.14` in `src-tauri/Cargo.toml` and `src-tauri/tauri.conf.json`.
2. `cargo build` to refresh `Cargo.lock`.
3. Commit message: `Release v0.1.14`.
4. Create local tag `v0.1.14` at the release commit.

First item to use the new `files: [...]` form so the TO COMMIT review shows all three changed files inline.

Alternatives considered: patch bump vs minor bump (0.2.0). Patch chosen because xmlui-desktop is still pre-1.0; minor/patch boundaries are loose in this range, and consistency with prior 0.1.x cadence trumps semver strictness.

Pushing the commits (agent-tools drawer push button), pushing the tag (`git push origin v0.1.14`), and dispatching `.github/workflows/build.yml` from the GitHub Actions UI are user-driven steps after the worklist item lands.
